title: ehretia rigida
intro: Ehretia rigida, also known as the 'Hairy Fountain Bush' or 'Fountain Bush', is a shrub native to Australia, characterized by its hairy branches and white, pink, or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Ehretia rigida lie in its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from respiratory issues. Ehretia rigida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions and digestive problems.
